title: Profile React render and commit behavior
description: Record a React Profiler session for a changed interaction and report which components rerendered, how often, and why.
body: Use when validating that a change did not introduce excess rerenders. Actions: open the React DevTools Profiler (or instrument with the Profiler API), record the target interaction, and report the commit count, slowest components, and the trigger (props/state/context/parent) for each rerender. Do not infer render behavior from reading code alone. This skill exposes capability only and must not run a browser session without runtime permission. Validation signals include a render trace with commit timings and a before/after comparison. Risk boundary: if no profiling environment is available, report the render impact as unverified rather than claiming an improvement.
